calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Mar-16-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - MELANIE M. SHELBY, TEL. NO. (510) 701-9646, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF DEFENDNT MELANIE M. SHELBY is Granted in part. Defendant has established that $2,990.71 of her monthly earnings are necessary for her support and are therefore exempt from garnishment. (See CCP sec. 706.051.) The remainder of Defendant's monthly salary, or $238.04, is not exempt. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/ehg
